name: Smoked Prime Rib (Rich Davis, K.c. Masterpiece Resturant)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place dry rub seasonings over entire roast surface.
2. Grill roast in smoker (indirect heat) for 3 to 4 hours at 200 to 250°F until a meat thermometer indicates 140°F (for M-Rare).
3. Sprinkle crushed rosemary leaves three-quarters of the way through the cooking time.
